title: erigeron cyanactis
intro: Erigeron cyanactis, also known as blue flaxflower or blue daisy, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Erigeron cyanactis has been used to treat various health problems, including fever, sore throats, and menstrual cramps, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make salves, creams, and ointments for topical application, as well as taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
